detectors.description:
TimeCapsuleEvent.kill() (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#109-115) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- this.balance == 0 (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#111)

Ownable.transferOwner(address) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#25-33) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- this.balance == 0 (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#27)
TimeCapsuleEvent.withdraw(uint256) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#89-105) ignores return value by msg.sender.send(amount) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#97)

Ownable.transferOwner(address) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#25-33) should emit an event for: 
	- Owner = _owner (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#29)

Ownable.transferOwner(address)._owner (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#25) lacks a zero-check on :
		- Owner = _owner (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#29)
Modifier Ownable.onlyOwner() (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#15-21) does not always execute _; or revert
detectors.markdown: Modifier [Ownable.onlyOwner()](TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#L15-L21) does not always execute _; or revert

detectors.description:
TimeCapsuleEvent.withdraw(uint256) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#89-105) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- now >= openDate (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#91)
detectors.markdown:
[TimeCapsuleEvent.withdraw(uint256)](TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#L89-L105) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [now >= openDate](TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#L91)

detectors.description:

Parameter Ownable.transferOwner(address)._owner (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#25) is not in mixedCase

Reentrancy in TimeCapsuleEvent.withdraw(uint256) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#89-105):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.send(amount) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#97)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Withdrawal(msg.sender,amount) (TimeCapsuleEvent.sol#99)
